# Hooray HQ

> Balloon garland hire and custom party styling based in Whangaparaoa, serving Auckland, New Zealand. We make beautiful balloon installations the easiest part of your celebration.

Hooray HQ offers two ways to get balloons for your event:

- **Grab & Go**: ready-made, pre-inflated balloon garlands, arches, mini garlands and freestanding stacks that you choose online (colours + size) and collect yourself. Includes mounting hooks and install instructions. From NZD $80.
- **Custom & Themed**: fully designed, delivered and installed balloon displays tailored to your theme, anywhere across Auckland. Quoted per project; 50% deposit secures the booking.
- **DIY Kits**: balloons, garland tape, tools and a how-to guide to build your own garland. From NZD $49.

Colours are customisable from curated palettes or a full Tuftex colour picker (choose your own). Foil numbers, letters and themed foils can be added.

## Key facts
- Location: Whangaparaoa, Auckland, New Zealand. Service area: Auckland (delivery for custom installs; Grab & Go is collection).
- Contact: hello@hoorayhq.co.nz · Instagram @hooray.hq
- Payments: secure online checkout via Stripe.
- Balloon longevity: typically 7 days, up to ~3 weeks kept indoors away from heat and direct sun.
- Booking lead time: a few days for Grab & Go; 3–4 weeks recommended for custom installs.

- [Store / Home](https://hoorayhq.co.nz/): full product range, colour picker, FAQs and enquiry/booking.
